metadata.description: ScopeBlind governance plugins for Claude Code: a fail-closed policy gate that signs every decision, and an offline verifier that checks those decisions with no vendor trust.

plugins.name: protect-mcp
plugins.description: Fail-closed Cedar policy gate plus Ed25519 signed receipts for every tool call. Denies on any policy error, proves the gate is live with a startup self-test, and lets you inspect and edit the policy from the CLI. Receipts verify offline with no vendor trust.

plugins.name: verify-mcp
plugins.description: Offline verifier for signed receipts, audit bundles, and trust artifacts. Ed25519 + JCS, no accounts, no network calls. The companion to protect-mcp: it checks what the gate decided with the operator's software removed.
